decision_context: Disposition binding for 13 imported Claude-originated artifacts from repaired full-OS bundle.
candidate_options: Keep all source artifacts in place and promote wholesale
Split rationale-heavy artifacts while promoting executable artifacts into successor paths
Archive most artifacts and rebuild successors from scratch
selection_rule: Choose dispositions that minimize ambiguity, preserve rationale in ADR/archive targets, and route executable value into explicit successor artifacts.
chosen_option: Split rationale-heavy artifacts while promoting executable artifacts into successor paths
rejected_options: Keep all source artifacts in place and promote wholesale
Archive most artifacts and rebuild successors from scratch
